'''Voakar Duset''' was a [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] some time during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He spent his time lingering around a camp of [[Mustafarian/Legends|Mustafarian]] [[Miner/Legends|miners]] on strike, although his reasons for doing so were uncertain.

==Behind the scenes==
Voakar Duset appeared as a non-player character in the video game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online-[[roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. Voakar Duset's presence on Mustafar is something of a mystery—he is the only known [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] NPC in the entire game, yet he is apparently unconnected with any quests whatsoever.

The list of NPCs in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' lists Duset's social group (faction) as "must bandit". All other members of this social group belong to the [[Salvage bandits]].
